text: Crabs never donate to charity. They're shellfish.
An alligator in a vest appeared at the crime scene. He was the investigator.
The cookie was feeling a bit crummy at the hospital.
There's a nasty rumor going around about the butter. They're saying it won't spread.
It takes ten tickles to make an octopus laugh.
Spread the word. The word is legs.
I used to hate facial hair, but then it grew on me.
I'm reading a book about anti-gravity. It's impossible to put down.
Did you hear about the guy who invented Lifesavers? He made a mint.
A bicycle can't stand on its own because it's two-tired.
I told my doctor I broke my arm in two places. He told me to stop going to those places.
Time flies like an arrow. Fruit flies like a banana.
I asked the librarian if the library had books about paranoia. She whispered, "They're right behind you."
Never trust an atom. They make up everything.
I would tell you a construction pun, but I'm still working on it.
